prompt: Aerial photograph style illustration of a vast jungle canopy viewed from directly above, with three-quarters of the frame filled with dense dark green forest and one quarter consumed by dry cracked brown land spreading inward like a slow wave. The boundary between forest and destruction is jagged and irregular. A thin winding river passes through the remaining green area. The forest appears like a shrinking island surrounded by lifeless land. Deep shadows and natural lighting. Mood: silent loss, irreversible damage, environmental grief. Color palette: deep green, burnt brown, dusty beige. Photorealistic, high detail, cinematic lighting. No text, no labels, no numbers, no charts, no symbols.
insight: Brazil lost a massive portion of the Amazon rainforest between 2000 and 2020.
